glm-5.2.notes: GLM-5.2 prices per 1M tokens: input $1.40, cached input $0.26, output $4.40. Reasoning tokens, when separately reported, are treated as output tokens for normalized estimates.

gpt-5.5.source: OpenAI official API pricing, standard short-context
gpt-5.5.notes: gpt-5.5 standard short-context prices per 1M tokens: input $5.00, cached input $0.50, output $30.00. Reasoning tokens are treated as output tokens.

limitations: Estimates are not invoices; subscriptions, routing, discounts, regional uplift, long-context tiers, and provider billing may differ.
agy remains unavailable because no reliable token counts were exported.
ccusage is the preferred first-pass collector for supported local sources; direct extraction is fallback/cross-check when per-run attribution is missing.
ccusage gemini support applies to Gemini CLI logs, not the Antigravity agy transcript format used in these runs.

Bulk BB-002/004-012 telemetry restored for Claude, Codex, OpenCode, MiMo, and Pi using exact per-run attribution; agy remains n/a because Antigravity transcripts still lack reliable token/cost export.

Token/cost telemetry is not uniformly raw-replayable from public files: some rows are exact local ccusage/provider-store extractions published as sanitized metrics with run/session attribution; see docs/audit/telemetry-provenance.json.
Codex normalized public cost includes reasoning tokens as output tokens; vendorCost preserves the ccusage/native cost value separately where available.
Execution quality excludes token/cost telemetry for every agent; token and cost efficiency are shown in separate panels instead of being mixed into the quality score.

OpenCode ccusage total tokens can differ slightly from the visible token_breakdown sum because provider accounting includes token categories not exposed in the published breakdown; the total and cost use ccusage reported totals.
Cost rankings use each agent’s configured model price; they are scaffold+model economics, not pure scaffold-only price comparisons.
Outcome/pass-rate comparisons are scaffold+model configuration signals until a held-constant model sweep is run.

telemetryBasis.fallback_policy: Use direct JSON/JSONL/SQLite extraction only when ccusage cannot attribute a row to the exact benchmark run/workspace/session, or when the agent did not persist ccusage-readable logs.
telemetryBasis.agy_note: ccusage gemini supports Gemini CLI logs, not necessarily Antigravity agy transcripts under ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/brain; agy token/cost remains unavailable in these runs.

sources: ccusage codex exact session id from agent.log; normalized public cost recomputed from input/cache/output/reasoning tokens, vendorCost preserves ccusage native cost
ccusage opencode exact session id from opencode.log directory

executionQualityComposite.label: Execution quality 0–100 composite
executionQualityComposite.formula: 40 correctness + 15 red-baseline + 15 smoke + 15 independent verify + 5 clean agent exit + 10 speed percentile
notes: Speed is normalized within each scenario so scores are comparable inside a task, not across unrelated task sizes.
Token/cost telemetry is intentionally excluded from execution quality; efficiency is shown separately in token and cost panels.
